attempt: Transfer TICKET45's rule: a visual, numerical, or quotient pattern may be promoted only after its symbolic clauses survive same-clause pressure loops, pressure-cycle extraction, and future-lift closure.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite zero-feature quotient treated as RH
bounded_result.retained_target: A stable symbolic zero-clause grammar has no off-critical pressure cycle and yields a positive-kernel margin.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: an off-critical zero-lift pressure cycle or same-clause nonpositive kernel loop

obstruction: The current artifact gives a sharper falsification protocol for proof candidates, but it does not close the infinite theorem and it does not produce a certified counterexample.
candidate_theorem: A stable symbolic zero-clause grammar has no off-critical pressure cycle and yields a positive-kernel margin.
next_experiment: Search symbolic zero clauses for pressure cycles before promoting any kernel-rank candidate.
claim_boundary: No riemann proof and no certified riemann counterexample.
